sentences.arabic: كَانَ المُعَلِّمُ يَسْأَلُ الطُّلَّابَ أَسْئِلَةً فِي كُلِّ دَرْسٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je postavljao učenicima pitanja na svakom času.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher asked the students questions in every lesson.

sentences.arabic: رَفَعَ حَسَنٌ يَدَهُ وَأَجَابَ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je podigao ruku i glasno odgovorio.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan raised his hand and answered in a loud voice.

sentences.translation: Odgovor je bio tačan i nastavnik ga je pohvalio.
sentences.translationEn: The answer was correct and the teacher praised him.

sentences.translation: Hasan se osjećao ponosno pred drugovima.
sentences.translationEn: Hassan felt proud in front of his classmates.
